properties.Key Activities proposed for Soil and Wat: 1. Soil conservation practices -  Medakumbura North - Ensi Division  (50°-70°)
properties.Proposed measure/s: 1. Live fencing/SALT  - 250 m/ 2. Lock and spills - 500 m/ 3. Stone terracing - 250 m/ 4. Agronomic practices should be adapted at optimum level (conservation tillage, crop rotation and diversification, cover crops, mulching, contour farming, windbreaks
properties.Contribution (Local Community, LA, and t: Labour and other basic services by the Local community
